# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly.

**Do not open a public issue.** Instead, email `smnandre@gmail.com` with:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Any relevant context (PHP version, OS, etc.)

You should receive an acknowledgment within 48 hours. We will work with you to understand and address the issue before any public disclosure.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest minor release is actively supported with security fixes.
